property.name: azureMapsAuthFunctionUrl
property.description-key: HTTP endpoint that returns an Azure Maps jwt-sas token payload.

property.name: mapDomain
property.description-key: Azure Maps domain host. Use atlas.microsoft.com (public cloud) or atlas.azure.us (Azure Government).

property.name: mapStyle
property.description-key: Azure Maps style name (for example: road, satellite, grayscale_dark).

property.name: activeRecordId
property.description-key: Input record id to highlight and center on the map.

property.name: selectedRecordId
property.description-key: Record Id for the currently selected map point.

property-set.name: recordIdColumn
property-set.description-key: Column that contains the record identifier for output.

property-set.name: titleColumn
property-set.description-key: Optional column used for the pin label and hover text.
